title: Cooking & Exploring New Cuisine
desc: I experiment with food and create fusion dishes that mix different flavors and cultures.

detail.body:
Every weekend, I find myself going down a rabbit hole of cookbooks and weird recipe videos on TikTok. One dish I am proud of making is peanut butter noodles with shrimp and lamb, inspired by Thai and Korean flavors.

[IMAGE: assets/img/peanut_noodle.jpg | Peanut butter noodles with shrimp and lamb]

I also followed a TikTok hack to make pizza from scratch, and it was so fun to make. Cooking or trying a new technique is always a good way for me to be creative and work with chemistry in a culinary way.

Here are the burnt pizzas, lol.

[IMAGE: assets/img/pizza.jpg | The burnt pizzas, lol]
